title: The Last Case of August T. Harrison
original_title: The Last Case of August T. Harrison
overview: August T. Harrison, private eye, comes out of retirement to solve a bizarre missing persons case, but finds himself caught in the middle of a dark conspiracy involving the writings of H.P. Lovecraft.
